name: secret-to-file-action
description: This action allows storing the content of a file as a base64 secret and writing it to a file during the build process.

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts src/post.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --format=esm --platform=node --target=node24 --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build

author: Sebastian Messingfeld
